notes.18-21: Illustrations: space=none, a=illus, b=maps, c=portraits, d=charts
notes.23: Form of item: space=none, a=microfilm, b=microfiche, c=microopaque, d=large print, f=braille, o=online, q=direct electronic, r=regular print reproduction, s=electronic
notes.34: Biography: space=no biographical info, a=autobiography, b=individual biography, c=collective biography, d=contains biographical info

notes.008/23: Form of item MUST be 'o' (online resource) for e-books
notes.007: Field 007 required: c=computer file, r=remote access

notes.007/21: Type of continuing resource: p=periodical, n=newspaper, m=monographic series, j=journal, s=series, d=updating database
notes.008/18: Frequency: u=unknown, a=annual, b=bimonthly, c=semiweekly, d=daily, e=biweekly, f=semiannual, g=biennial, h=triennial, i=three times a week, j=three times a month, k=continuously updated, m=monthly, q=quarterly, s=semimonthly, t=three times a year, w=weekly
notes.008/19: Regularity: r=regular, i=irregular, n=normalized irregular, u=unknown
